name: RMW - AA12
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - American made, big, black, boxy automatic shotgun that spits buckshot like theres no tomorrow. Daddy FPS Russia would love this. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
